title: BigBear.ai Holdings Earnings Dates & Report
text: MarketBeat tracks BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) earnings dates and historical earnings performance. The company's next earnings announcement is scheduled for August 10, 2026. Historical earnings performance shows that BBAI has missed revenue expectations in recent quarters despite strong backlog growth. Q1 2026 revenue of $34.4 million came in slightly above consensus of $33.6 million, reversing a pattern of recent misses. The company typically reports earnings after market close with a conference call following. Earnings release dates are typically announced 4-6 weeks in advance on the investor relations website. MarketBeat provides historical earnings data, showing BigBear.ai's revenue trajectory of $127.7 million in 2025 and expected 2026 guidance of $135-165 million. The earnings calendar includes scheduled conference calls with management. Investors should monitor quarterly earnings for updates on: contract wins, backlog progression, Ask Sage integration and contribution, margin trends, and cash burn rate. These metrics will be critical to assessing whether BigBear.ai can achieve profitability and sustain revenue growth.
